steps.title: Find the rate of change
steps.content:
From the table, use the points $(0,9)$ and $(1,64)$.
$$\frac{64-9}{1-0}=55$$

steps.title: Write the linear equation
steps.content:
When $c=0$, the value of $p$ is $9$, so the equation is
$$p=55c+9$$

steps.title: Match the answer form
steps.content:
Rearrange the equation to match the choices.
$$p=55c+9$$
$$55c-p=-9$$
The answer is A.
